title: canthium moluccanum
intro: Canthium moluccanum, also known as the 'Bintangor tree', is a plant species native to Southeast Asia and the Pacific Islands, belonging to the Loganiaceae family. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal activities. The health benefits of Canthium moluccanum include its ability to treat fever, sore throats, and skin irritations, as well as its potential to lower blood pressure and cholesterol levels. Canthium moluccanum can be prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or tinctures, making it a versatile medicinal plant with various applications.
